name: ooj-tools
description: Plugins developed with agentic sensibilities in mind - tooling built for how coding agents actually work.

plugins.name: dox
plugins.description: Deterministic AGENTS.md tree engine: injects the local AGENTS.md chain before edits (J1) and gates finishing on documentation drift (J3).

plugins.name: transcripts
plugins.description: Configurable, worktree-safe Markdown transcript archives for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: spec-to-tasks
plugins.description: Turn a PRD, spec, or MVP doc into a readable markdown task tree: parse into tasks, score complexity, and expand into subtasks — native skills, no MCP server or API keys.
